---
id: get-query-results
title: "Get query results"
description: "Get the latest execution results for a query. Results can be downloaded in JSON, CSV, or Parquet format. Query parameters can be passed as '$name' query string keys."
sidebar_label: "Get query results"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/openapi/datadata-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get query results"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/queries/{id}/results"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the latest execution results for a query. Results can be downloaded in JSON, CSV, or Parquet format. Query parameters can be passed as "$name" query string keys.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
